codeReview.summary: The detail page, install controls, and markdown/raw preview are all wired up, but the implementation still misses one contract-critical metadata field.

issues.description: VAL-DET-001 requires the detail page metadata to show an installation timestamp. This page renders `detail.scanned_at` as "Scanned at" and the installation rows only show the installed path, so no installation-time metadata is surfaced anywhere. Because the fetched detail/installations shape also lacks any install timestamp field, the milestone's metadata assertion is still unmet and user testing of the detail page will fail.

summary: Fail. The skill detail page shows scan time instead of any installation timestamp, so VAL-DET-001 remains unsatisfied.
